ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Hobart, Launceston, Online) */,
  "location_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "location_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the location */,
  "location_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the location can accommodate */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., Campus, Online) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_periods" (
  "study_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study period */,
  "study_period_name" TEXT /* Name of the study period (e.g., Semester 1, Semester 2) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study period */,
  "duration_weeks" INTEGER /* Duration of the study period in weeks */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the study period is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance_options" (
  "attendance_option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance option */,
  "attendance_option_name" TEXT /* Name of the attendance option (e.g., On-Campus, Off-Campus, None) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attendance option */,
  "is_online" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attendance option is online */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the course is offered */,
  "study_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study period for the course */,
  "attendance_option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendance option for the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisite courses required for enrollment */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  "is_elective" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is elective or required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_study_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_period_id") REFERENCES study_periods ("study_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_attendance_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendance_option_id") REFERENCES attendance_options ("attendance_option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_variations" (
  "course_variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course variation */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "study_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study period for the course variation */,
  "attendance_option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendance option for the course variation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course variation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course variation */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course variation is currently active */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course variation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_variations_study_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_period_id") REFERENCES study_periods ("study_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_variations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_variations_attendance_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendance_option_id") REFERENCES attendance_options ("attendance_option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_groups" (
  "student_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student group */,
  "student_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the student group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the student group */,
  "is_international" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student group is international */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_availability" (
  "course_availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course availability */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "student_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student group */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course availability */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course availability */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is open for enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_availability_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_availability_student_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_group_id") REFERENCES student_groups ("student_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "student_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student group */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the university */,
  "is_international" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student is international */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "study_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study period */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received in the course */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is completed */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., Active, Withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_study_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_period_id") REFERENCES study_periods ("study_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of attendance (e.g., Present, Absent) */,
  "attendance_time" TEXT /* Time of attendance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the attendance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "is_part_time" INTEGER /* Indicates if the instructor is part-time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "administrator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "administrator_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the administrator */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("administrator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_administrators_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
